title: Saccidananda Ashram
tagline: Saccidananda Ashram — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Saccidananda Ashram (Tamil: சச்சிதானந்தா ஆசிரமம்; also called Shantivanam (சாந்திவனம்) is a Camaldolese Benedictine monastery in Tannirpalli, India founded in 1950.
overview.description: Saccidananda Ashram (Tamil: சச்சிதானந்தா ஆசிரமம்; also called Shantivanam (சாந்திவனம்) is a Camaldolese Benedictine monastery in Tannirpalli, India founded in 1950.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Musiri
topPlaces.description: Musiri is a town in the Tiruchirappalli district in the India state of Tamil Nadu. It has an average elevation of 82 metres (269 feet).

topPlaces.name: Musiri taluk
topPlaces.description: Musiri taluk is a taluk of Tiruchirapalli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Musiri.

topPlaces.name: Marudur, Karur
topPlaces.description: Marudur is a panchayat town in Karur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.Mrs. Janaki ammal wife of mathematician Srinivasan Ramanujan hails from this village near to mardur railway station.

topPlaces.name: Inootrumangalam
topPlaces.description: Inootrumangalam is a village in Karur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The village is part of the K. Pettai panchayat and belongs to the Kulithalai sub district.

topPlaces.name: Manamedu Trichy
topPlaces.description: Manamedu is a village in Thottiyam taluk in the district of Tiruchirapalli (Trichy) with population of roughly 13,500 people. Land ruling community saliyar are land lord and powerful ruling community in Manamedu.

topPlaces.name: Vaatpokki Ratnagirswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Vaatpokki Ratnagiriswarar temple is a Hindu temple located at Karur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Sirugamani
topPlaces.description: Sirugamani is a panchayat town in Srirangam taluk Tiruchirappalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It's situated on the banks of river cauvery, just a few miles away from Trichy on the way towards Karur.

items.note: Musiri is a town in the Tiruchirappalli district in the India state of Tamil Nadu. It has an average elevation of 82 metres (269 feet).

Manamedu is a village in Thottiyam taluk in the district of Tiruchirapalli (Trichy) with population of roughly 13,500 people. Land ruling community saliyar are land lord and powerful ruling community in Manamedu.
Vaatpokki Ratnagiriswarar temple is a Hindu temple located at Karur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

Sirugamani is a panchayat town in Srirangam taluk Tiruchirappalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It's situated on the banks of river cauvery, just a few miles away from Trichy on the way towards Karur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Saccidananda Ashram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Saccidananda Ashram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Saccidananda Ashram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (35 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Saccidananda Ashram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Saccidananda Ashram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Saccidananda Ashram?
faq.a: Stays in Saccidananda Ashram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Saccidananda Ashram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Musiri, Musiri taluk, Marudur, Karur, Inootrumangalam, Manamedu Trichy.
